message:
plan: implement mission transaction coordinator with full prepare/commit/compensate pipeline

Expand the plan module with the complete mission transaction subsystem,
replacing the flat MissionTxValidationError enum with a composable
multi-phase coordinator:

Prepare-Phase (H4):
  - TxPrepareStepReadiness / TxPrepareReport / evaluate_prepare_phase()
  - Safety-gate evaluation: policy, reservation, approval, kill-switch,
    and liveness checks must all pass before commit proceeds

Commit-Phase (H5):
  - TxCommitStepResult / TxCommitReport / execute_commit_phase()
  - Barrier-semantic step execution with monotonic receipt chains
  - First-failure halts the pipeline and yields a partial commit report

Compensation/Rollback (H6):
  - TxCompensationStepResult / TxCompensationReport / execute_compensation_phase()
  - Reverse-ordinal compensation for partial commits, with per-step
    outcome tracking and barrier semantics

Idempotency/Dedupe/Resume (H7):
  - TxExecutionRecord / TxIdempotencyVerdict / validate_tx_idempotency()
  - reconstruct_tx_resume_state() for recovering partial-progress offset
  - Deterministic idempotency key derivation from mission+assignment+step

Pause/Resume/Abort (C5):
  - MissionCheckpoint / MissionPauseResumeState / MissionControlDecision
  - Checkpoint capture and state machine for clean lifecycle transitions

Crash-Consistent Journal (C8):
  - MissionJournal with append-only entries, checkpoint, and compaction
  - MissionJournalReplayReport for deterministic restart from journal

Also adds:
  - Intent ledger (append-only event-sourced persistence)
  - Dispatch deduplication (MissionDispatchDedupState)
  - Global kill-switch (FTM1009, terminal/never-retry)
  - Adaptive replanning triggers and backoff policy

Test coverage:
  - 6 new proptest modules (commit-phase, compensation, idempotency-resume,
    journal, pause-resume, each with 5-10 property-based tests)
  - orchestration_integration.rs: journal lifecycle, kill-switch activation,
    dispatch dedup, failure taxonomy integration tests
  - tx_correctness_suite.rs (ft-1i2ge.8.10): deterministic pipeline
    integration covering commit-to-compensation, idempotency lifecycle,
    and resume state reconstruction

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
